name: Xi Kang's Spleen Freezing Wine Antidote

system.description: Xi Kang's Spleen Freezing Wine Antidote: This antidote nullifies the effects of Xi Kang's Spleen Freezing Wine. It is made with 24 total ingredients, including peonies, fresh ginger, lotus seed, and long pepper. Brew Rating: TN 9.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
system.effects: Nullifies the effects of Xi Kang's Spleen Freezing Wine.
